sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports fatigue for the past couple of months. The patient denies blood in her stools. The patient reports no swelling in her legs. The patient reports a good support system.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The patient's hemoglobin level is 8.2, which is lower than expected. The clinician hears a slight two out of six systolic heart murmur.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The clinician suspects cervical radiculopathy. The clinician notes tenderness to palpation in the right lower quadrant.
medical_concepts: tenderness to palpation in the right lower quadrant

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The clinician plans a cervical MRI. The clinician plans an endoscopy and a colonoscopy. The clinician will order a referral to gastroenterology. The clinician will continue the patient on toprol, lisinopril, and lasix.

medical_concepts: tenderness to palpation in the right lower quadrant
